CustomMetadata.label: UA-002 - Permission Set granting Modify All Data

values.value: Permission Set granting Modify All Data
A standalone permission set with PermissionsModifyAllData=true is assigned to one or more active users. This grants those users full org-wide data access regardless of their profile.
Any user granted this permission set can read, edit, and delete every record in the org. A compromised or malicious user can perform a full data export or deletion.
Remove PermissionsModifyAllData from the permission set. Replace with scoped object-level CRUD permissions. Assign ModifyAllData only via the System Administrator profile when truly required.
